name: MetricsCard
description: Card displaying key metrics and statistics with trend indicators and optional actions.

statusBadge.description: Status badge: { label: string, color: BadgeColor }

cta.description: Call to action: { label: string, onClick: () => void }

examples.title: With Trend
examples.code:
<MetricsCard
  title="Active Users"
  value="2,543"
  trend={{ label: '+12%', type: 'up' }}
/>

examples.title: With Variation
examples.code:
<MetricsCard
  title="Monthly Sales"
  value="$12,500"
  variation={{ value: '+$2,100', type: 'increase' }}
/>

examples.title: With Status Badge
examples.code:
<MetricsCard
  title="Server Status"
  value="Operational"
  statusBadge={{ label: 'Healthy', color: 'success' }}
/>

examples.title: With CTA
examples.code:
<MetricsCard
  title="Pending Orders"
  value="24"
  cta={{ label: 'View All', onClick: () => navigate('/orders') }}
/>

examples.title: Full Example
examples.code:
<MetricsCard
  title="Revenue"
  value="$125,430"
  icon="dollar-sign"
  variation={{ value: '+15.3%', type: 'increase' }}
  trend={{ label: 'vs last month', type: 'up' }}
  cta={{ label: 'View Report', onClick: handleViewReport }}
/>

examples.title: Stats Grid
